# StockPro

> AI-powered stock and crypto research platform. Twelve specialized AI agents produce deep research reports on any ticker in minutes, plus portfolio tracking, watchlists, and price alerts — built for retail investors who want institutional-grade analysis.

StockPro generates structured research reports covering fundamentals, technicals, risk factors, competitive landscape, and news sentiment. A team of 12 specialist AI agents researches in parallel, drawing from live market data, financial filings, and real-time web sources, before a synthesis agent merges everything into one cohesive report. After each report, users can chat with an AI grounded in the report's content (RAG) to dig deeper into any section.

## Product

- [Landing page](https://stock-pro.org/): Overview of StockPro, features, and how it works.
- [Pricing](https://stock-pro.org/pricing): Free tier and paid plans.
- [Sign up](https://stock-pro.org/sign-up): Create a free account. No credit card required.
- [Sign in](https://stock-pro.org/sign-in): Existing users.

## Developers and AI agents

- StockPro CLI: Run research, list reports, and manage portfolios from your terminal. Install with `pip install stockpro-cli`, then sign in with `stockpro auth login`. It talks to the same backend as the web app over HTTPS.
- Agent-friendly: a device-code login (`stockpro auth device-login`) and an injectable `STOCKPRO_TOKEN` environment variable let AI agents run StockPro in headless or serverless environments with no browser.
- [stockpro-cli on PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/stockpro-cli/): Install and command reference.

## Features

- Deep AI Research: 12 specialized agents research fundamentals, technicals, risk, and news in parallel.
- Portfolio Tracking: Multiple portfolios with real-time P&L, cost basis, and sector allocation.
- Smart Watchlists: Custom lists with live prices, sparklines, earnings calendar, and AI news briefings.
- Price Alerts: Get notified the moment a stock or crypto hits your target.
- Report Chat: Conversational follow-up grounded in your research reports.
- Command-line tool (CLI): Run research and manage portfolios from the terminal via `pip install stockpro-cli`; agent-friendly with device-code login and token injection.
